issues.title: Kafka middleware

labels.name: lifecycle/stale
labels.description: Denotes an issue or PR has remained open with no activity and has become stale.

issues.body:
Implement Kafka middleware.

With CloudEvents: similar to https://github.com/knative-extensions/func-go/blob/main/cmd/fce/main.go
With raw messages: similar to https://github.com/knative-extensions/func-go/blob/main/cmd/fhttp/main.go

pullRequests.title: Implement Kafka middleware for CloudEvents and raw message handling
pullRequests.body:
Adds Kafka consumer middleware following the existing patterns from `cloudevents` and `http` packages.

## Implementation

**Core Package (`kafka/`)**
- `service.go` - Kafka consumer with automatic CloudEvents detection (structured/binary mode) and raw message handling
- `instance.go` - Handler interfaces supporting both `Handle(context.Context, event.Event)` and `Handle(context.Context, kafka.Message)` signatures
- `logs.go` - Logging configuration matching existing packages
- `service_test.go` - Tests for lifecycle, configuration parsing, and handler detection
- `mock/function.go` - Test mock avoiding import cycles
- `README.md` - Comprehensive documentation for the kafka package

**Example Commands**

Following the repository pattern of separate commands for different handler types:

**`cmd/fcekafka/main.go`** - CloudEvents handler example (similar to `fce`)
```go
type MyFunction struct{}

func (f *MyFunction) Handle(ctx context.Context, e event.Event) (*event.Event, error) {
    fmt.Println("Instanced CloudEvents handler invoked")
    fmt.Println(e)
    return &e, nil
}

func main() {
    kafka.Start(New())
}
```

**`cmd/frawkafka/main.go`** - Raw message handler example (similar to `fhttp`)
```go
type MyFunction struct{}

func (f *MyFunction) Handle(ctx context.Context, msg kafka.Message) error {
    fmt.Printf("Topic: %s, Partition: %d, Offset: %d\n", msg.Topic, msg.Partition, msg.Offset)
    fmt.Printf("Key: %s, Value: %s\n", string(msg.Key), string(msg.Value))
    return nil
}

func main() {
    kafka.Start(New())
}
```

## Configuration

Environment variables:
- `KAFKA_BROKERS` - Comma-separated broker list (default: `localhost:9092`)
- `KAFKA_TOPICS` - Comma-separated topics (default: `func-topic`)
- `KAFKA_CONSUMER_GROUP` - Consumer group ID (default: `func-go-consumer`)

## Dependencies

Added `github.com/segmentio/kafka-go@v0.4.49` - standard Go Kafka client with no known vulnerabilities.

- Fixes knative-extensions/func-go#139
